stopConditions: Two consecutive tool failures on the same operation
Implementation diverges from compiled blueprint intent

Failure mode reached: pnpm-workspace.yaml is absent or malformed YAML; glob expansion matches a directory whose package.json is missing or has no name field; WorkspaceRoot.packageNames is empty — no packages discovered

Failure mode reached: a WorkspacePackage.tsConfigPath does not exist on disk; TsConfig.composite is false or missing for a WorkspacePackage — incremental project-references build will silently skip type-checking this package; a PackageDependencyEdge exists from A to B but TsConfig for A has no ProjectReference to B's tsconfig — tsc -b will not enforce build order for this edge; a ProjectReference in a TsConfig points to a path that does not resolve to any WorkspacePackage.tsConfigPath — dangling reference
requiredEvidence: WorkspaceRoot.packageNames is populated; a WorkspacePackage entity exists for every matched directory containing a valid package.json; each WorkspacePackage.name matches its package.json name field
PackageDependencyEdge set is complete; every edge references two valid WorkspacePackage entities; WorkspacePackage.internalDependencies lists resolved package references
BuildOrder.hasCycle is false; BuildOrder.orderedPackages contains all WorkspacePackage names exactly once; for every PackageDependencyEdge (A→B), B appears before A in BuildOrder.orderedPackages

every WorkspacePackage.isComposite is true; every required ProjectReference exists and its referencedTsConfigPath resolves to a valid file; no TsConfig.projectReferences references a path outside the workspace
no .js, .d.ts, or .tsbuildinfo files exist under any WorkspacePackage.distDir; DistArtifact state is absent for all packages

tsc process exits with code 0; for each WorkspacePackage, DistArtifact.jsFiles is non-empty, DistArtifact.declarationFiles is non-empty, TsBuildInfo.filePath exists with updated lastBuildTimestamp; DistArtifact state is complete for all packages
